strategy: Balance boss with a crowd of minions but no punishing reactive cheats; hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+6% each).
His and his minions' cheats are just flavor lines on their natural attacks, so play the standard blade-and-hit loop without special avoidance.
Use AoE to manage the minion crowd, and funnel a big hit into Stallion.
Keep a heal ready for the several natural attacks coming in each Round.
